identity.name: Convo Sphere
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Swiss precision with Soft Utility warmth.
Content is King: The conversation is the hero. UI recedes.
Density with Breath: High information density (for support agents) but with generous padding between groups.
Contrast: High contrast for readability, subtle contrast for hierarchy.

rules: Primary color ONLY for main CTAs and active states.

glassmorphism.header: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-lg border-b border-white/20 sticky top-0 z-50

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-sm font-medium px-6 py-2.5 rounded-md transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 font-medium px-6 py-2.5 rounded-md transition-all
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground px-4 py-2 rounded-md transition-colors

cards.dashboard_widget: bg-white border border-slate-100 rounded-xl p-6 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow
cards.stat_card: bg-white border border-slate-100 rounded-xl p-6 flex flex-col gap-2

inputs.default: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

badges.status: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

general: Use 'Manrope' for all Headings and 'Inter' for body text.
Implement a 'Bento Grid' layout for the main dashboard.
Use the 'Electric Indigo' (#4338ca) as the primary brand color.
Ensure all interactive elements have 'data-testid' attributes.
Do NOT use generic gradients. Use solid colors or subtle noise textures.
For the Unified Inbox, use a 3-pane layout: Sidebar (Nav), List (Messages), Detail (Conversation).
Ensure high contrast for text readability (WCAG AA compliance).

layout_specifics.dashboard: Top row: Key Metrics (Unread, Response Time, CSAT). Middle: Volume Chart (Area Chart). Bottom: Agent Performance Table.
layout_specifics.inbox: Left: Channel filters. Middle: Message list with status indicators. Right: Chat interface with AI suggestions panel.

universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI slop' aesthetic (generic centered layouts, excessive gradients).
Create depth with z-index and subtle shadows.
Micro-animations on hover and focus are mandatory.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs.
NEVER use AI emojis (🤖, 🧠) as icons.
